titleStmt.title: SII 24.415: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 415. (A.R. No. 70 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of the village Vaḍavēṟkuḍi in lieu of 500 poṉ granted as loan to Śrīraṅga-Nārāyaṇa Jīyar, by Periya Tirumalairāja, son of Salakkaiyadēva-Mahārāja, for providing offerings to the god, as the service of Anantammaṉ, mother of the donor. A portion of the offered food was given for feeding the Vaishṇavas in the tirumāḷigai of Appan, son of Kandāḍai Aṇṇaṉ. The details of date viz. Śaka 1456, Jaya, Kanni, ba. 10, Wednesday, Punarpūśam correspond to 1534 A.D. September 2, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·29, f.d.n. ·33.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirājaparameśvara śrīvīrapradāpa śrīvīra Accyutadevamahārāyar pṛdhuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 6 Itaṉ melc cellā niṉṟa jayasam
vatssarattu kannināyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum bhudhavāramum peṟṟa puṇatpūśanakṣatrattu teṉkarai pāṇṭikulatcaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷāvaṟāvitivaḷa nāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrī
raṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku śrīmanmaṇḍahāmaleśvara calakkaiya devamahārājāvin putraṉ periya tirumalai devamahārājāvin mādā Anan=ta Ammaṉiṉ polivūṭṭu cilāsādhanam paṇṇikkuṭu
ttapaṭi . muṉṉāḷ periya tirumalai devamahārājāvin kaiyyile śrīraṅganārāyaṇa jiyar kaṭaṉāka vāṅkiṉa pon_5 100 Intappoṉ Aññūṟṟukkum śrīraṅganārāyaṇajiyar maṭappuṟam
kiḻpaṟṟu cirmai kākkaiāṭikkaraip pokku Iruvelip(m)paṟ cirmai vaṭaveṟkuṭi Ūr Oṉṟukku nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nañcey Uḻavaṉāl rūpāy 10 8- li
� puṉcey Uḻavaṉāl rūpāy 2- li Āka rūpāy 2 10- li Inta nilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum vilaippaṭi Āka niṉṟaiyamRead nirṇayampaṇṇiṉa ḷe5 100 Intappoṉ Aññūṟṟukkum
vilai Āṉa Inta vaṭaveṟkuṭi Ūr Oṉṟil Utayaṅkoṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai 4 Intat taḷikai nālukkum Uṇṭāṉa Amutu paṭi paruppu Amutu ney
Amutu kaṟi Amutu vakai Uḷpaṭṭa palacampāramum śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭu Inta vaṭaveṟkuṭi śrīpaṇṭārattile paṟṟukkaṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavatu Ākavum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutucey
taruḷum taḷikai nālukku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nāliloṉṟukku varum taḷikai 1 Inta taḷikai Oṉṟum kantāṭai Aṇṇaṉ kumārar Appaṉ tirumāḷikaikku śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷakkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa
paṭi Āle Aṉanta Ammaṉ Upaiyam Āka Inta vaṭaveṟkuṭi Ūr Oṉṟum Ācantrārkkasthāhi Āka śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu taḷikai Oṉṟum san=tānaparamparai Āka kantāṭai Appaṉ Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa kaṭavatu
Ākavum . Ippaṭikku Intaccilāsāthanam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu dānapālanayormmaddhye dānātśreyonu pālanam dānātsvarggamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 24.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
